introSection: Orochi is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Parc du Bocasse in Bocasse, Normandie, France. It was designed by Vekoma and opened in 2021.
fullText: Orochi is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Parc du Bocasse in Bocasse, Normandie, France. It was designed by Vekoma and opened in 2021.
